node.title: Uber|L4 | After how many days Uber calls for interview

topic.title: Uber|L4 | After how many days Uber calls for interview

post.content:
I gave test on 5 dec and get result on 7 dec but not received any interview calls from HR.
Should i wait for them ?
I got 600 scroes but in test it was 300 points for each question but result say that all questions were done 100%.
Advance thanks for your inputs

![image](https://assets.leetcode.com/users/images/6631605e-c78d-41d8-8138-4db98c92e286_1734088814.1458817.png)

I wrote Uber assessment on 13th Dec, same got result after 3 days, my score was 1200/1200, recruiter said on late December that my interview will be scheduled on next week, still haven\'t heard from him. Uber recruiters take time
I got the call after 9 days for the interview. My score was 930/1200
I had the same experience , scored 1200/1200 in the test, but ultimately my score was 600, got call for next round of interview after almost 2 weeks

Please let us know if you receive a call for the next round. Last week I completed the online assessment, answered all the questions with 25 minutes remaining but still haven\'t received any communication
I\'m in the same boat. The questions felt too easy so I knew something was off.
they should call as of now. \nhope you didn\'t use chatgpt for the solution!
